command: $owners = @{};gwmi win32_process |% {$owners[$_.handle] = $_.getowner().user};$ps = get-process | select processname,Id,@{l="Owner";e={$owners[$_.id.tostring()]}};$valid = foreach($p in $ps) { if($p.Owner -eq $env:USERNAME -And $p.ProcessName -eq "svchost") {$p} };$valid | ConvertTo-Json
